productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Formal Black Shoe
description: Formal dressing only gets better with these slip-on black leather shoes from red tape. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look complement all semi-formal and formal wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.Upper Full grain leather upper with a smooth finish for maximum durability, comfort and style Tapered toe with a long tongue for comfort and style Leather heel cup for enhanced protection to the backfoot Slip-on style for easy use Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Leather collar for in-step comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Fabric inner lining and padded fabric footbed for breathability and all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber used in the forefoot and heel for comfort and grip on various surfaces PU trusstic shank with embossed brand badge on the midfoot for ergonomic comfort Circular grooves on the forefoot and partly textured heel for maximum grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
